# Night Train

The train crossed the salt plain at midnight.[^signal]

## Inventory

- one brass key
- one folded map
- one unanswered letter

1. Wake before the border.
2. Watch for the blue lamp.

| Station | Time |

| 북쪽 | 03:45 |
